pinpointemail.configurationset.CfnAbout: Create a configuration set. *Configuration sets* are groups of rules that you can apply to the emails you send using Amazon Pinpoint. You apply a configuration set to an email by including a reference to the configuration set in the headers of the email. When you apply a configuration set to an email, all of the rules in that configuration set are applied to the email.

pinpointemail.configurationset.DeliveryO.Description: An object that defines the dedicated IP pool that is used to send emails that you send using the configuration set.

pinpointemail.configurationset.Name.Description: The name of the configuration set.

pinpointemail.configurationset.Reputatio.Description: An object that defines whether or not Amazon Pinpoint collects reputation metrics for the emails that you send that use the configuration set.

pinpointemail.configurationset.SendingOp.Description: An object that defines whether or not Amazon Pinpoint can send email that you send using the configuration set.

pinpointemail.configurationset.Tags.Description: An object that defines the tags (keys and values) that you want to associate with the configuration set.

pinpointemail.configurationset.TrackingO.Description: An object that defines the open and click tracking options for emails that you send using the configuration set.
